PREFIX p: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX ps: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/>
PREFIX pq: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/qualifier/>
SELECT DISTINCT ?musician ?musicianLabel WHERE {
  ?musician wdt:P106 wd:Q6256 ; wdt:P19 ?birthCity .
  ?birthCity wdt:P131 ?birthState .
  ?birthState wdt:P17 wd:Q30 .
  VALUES ?birthState {
    wd:Q417 wd:Q235 wd:Q179
  }
  ?musician p:P166 ?awardStatement .
  ?awardStatement ps:P166 wd:Q66320 .
  ?awardStatement pq:P585 ?awardYear .
  FILTER(YEAR(?awardYear) = 2022)
  OPTIONAL {
    ?musician rdfs:label ?musicianLabel
    FILTER(LANG(?musicianLabel) = 'en')
  }
}
